policies.representativeImageryDisclosure: Photography and generated editorial imagery are representative. They do not identify a NovaPharm-owned facility, current partner, authorised product or active regulated supply operation unless explicitly stated.

generation.ownerAuthorisation: Owner-supplied unique module art-direction brief dated 2026-07-15
generation.useStatus: Owner-authorised project media for NovaPharm-owned digital channels
generation.reviewRule: Human visual, regulatory-claims and accessibility review required before publication

sourcing.title: Direct GMP partnerships
sourcing.text: Direct relationships with qualified pharmaceutical manufacturers, supported by technical assessment, vendor qualification and quality agreements.

sourcing.title: Product-specific PLPI pathways
sourcing.text: Assessment of appropriate EEA-authorised medicines for UK parallel-import pathways, subject to product-specific applications and MHRA approval.

sourcing.title: European buying network
sourcing.text: A proposed network of qualified manufacturers, authorised distributors and licensed wholesalers across selected European markets.

partnerPathways.title: Manufacturing and development
partnerPathways.text: GMP manufacturers, CMO and CDMO organisations, product owners and dossier holders.

partnerPathways.title: Authorised sourcing
partnerPathways.text: European and UK licensed wholesalers assessed through defined qualification controls.

partnerPathways.title: Market access
partnerPathways.text: Pharmacy groups, hospital procurement and qualified account pathways, subject to applicable authorisation.

partnerPathways.title: Enabling infrastructure
partnerPathways.text: Logistics, quality, regulatory, data and technology specialists.
